findings.title: Missing Content Security Policy
findings.description: Page missing Content Security Policy header for resource integrity protection.
findings.fix_snippet:
// Add Content Security Policy
add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';" always;
findings.owasp_category: A08 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
